'''Heingort Giddis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Null (species)|Null]] [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] masquerading as [[Jedgar]], a [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Prophet of the Dark Side]].

==Biography==
The false [[Prophets of the Dark Side]] included an imitator of [[Jedgar]]. He was responsible for greeting visitors to the [[Scardia Station]]. The false Jedgar filled the same position as the true Jedgar, acting as the second in command of the Prophets as well as [[Kadann]]'s bodyguard. Additionally, he appeared to have roughly the same personality as the true Jedgar.

All the false Prophets of the Dark Side, but one named [[Orloc]], were killed when [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Afsheen Makati|Makati]] [[Bombardment of Scardia Station|bombarded]] [[Scardia Station]].<ref name="ENDTSD" />
